Localization.Description: Categories in db of digital fingerprints

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} modified category in database of digital fingerprints on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} updated category in database of digital fingerprints on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} created category in database of digital fingerprints on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
